releaseNotes:
📝 Release Summary

v1.7.0 — Health Tracking, Export & Reports

🆕 New Features:
• 📊 CSV & PDF Export — Export all BP records as CSV or PDF directly from Settings for easy sharing.
• 💊 Medication Tracking — Add, edit, and manage your medications with dosage, frequency, and active status. Accessible from Settings.
• 🏷️ BP Classification Filter — Filter your home screen readings by category (Normal, Elevated, Stage 1, Stage 2, Crisis) using filter chips.
• ⚖️ Weight & SpO2 Tracking — Optionally log weight (kg) and blood oxygen (SpO2 %) with each BP reading. Shown on cards and trends.
• 🩺 Doctor Report Generator — Generate a multi-page PDF report with patient info, averages, classification breakdown, morning vs evening analysis, and active medications.
• 💾 Local Backup & Restore — Export all data (readings + medications) to a JSON backup file, or restore from a previous backup with duplicate detection.
• 🔔 Summary Notifications — Receive weekly or monthly BP summary notifications with your average readings.

🛠 Technical:
• Room database migrated to v3 (v1→v2: weight/spO2 columns, v2→v3: medications table)
• New Medication entity, DAO, and repository
• BpSummaryWorker using WorkManager for periodic notifications
• PdfDocument API for native PDF generation (no external dependencies)
• Combined filtering with Kotlin Flow combine() on HomeViewModel
• DataStore preferences for summary notification settings

v1.6.1 - Widget
 Widget now can be added in the home screen

v1.6.0 — Theme, Reminders & Logo Update
• 🎨 Theme Selection — Light, Dark, or System theme
• ⏰ Daily Reminders — Custom daily BP logging reminders
• 🌙 Dark Splash Screen support
• 🎨 Updated App Logo
